changeSet.author: dharani

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM delivery_regions WHERE name = 'South India'

changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO delivery_regions (name, active, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ('South India', true, NOW(), NOW());
INSERT INTO delivery_region_states (region_id, state_id) SELECT r.id, s.state_id FROM delivery_regions r CROSS JOIN (VALUES (2),(16),(17),(32)) AS s(state_id) WHERE r.name = 'South India';
